subcodes.first_line: O thou who art ablaze with the Fire of God! Hearken unto the sighing of this Fire which hath been ignited at the axis of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها المشتعل بنار الله اسمع زفیر هذه النار التی اشتعلت فی قطب الاکوان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment
